CONTENT.Club career: A youth product of SF Altenbochum and VfL Bochum, he signed his first professional contract with Bochum on 17 June 2022 until 30 June 2024. He made his senior and professional debut with Bochum in a 1–1 Bundesliga tie with 1. FC Köln on 18 September 2022. On 23 December 2022, he extended his contract with the club until 2026. On 24 January 2023, he joined Wolfsberger AC on loan for the second half of the 2022–23 season in the Austrian Football Bundesliga.
CONTENT.International career: Oermann is a youth international for Germany, having been called up to the Germany U20s in March 2023.

SUMMARY: Tim Oermann (born 6 October 2003) is a German professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for VfL Bochum.
